body_transformation: The rounded head retains its pointed ears but now features delicate petal-like ear flaps with a subtle shimmer, while the short stubby legs are covered in soft ivory-white fur with tiny star-shaped foot pads. The plump compact body shifts to a soft pastel pink hue with delicate lavender highlights along the edges, and the curled tail tip now has a petal texture with a faint starlight silver sheen. The original leaf bulb on the back transforms into a glowing, translucent petal-like appendage with crystalline veins, and the red eyes with white highlights become softly glowing star-shaped orbs. The poison-type purple markings are replaced by a delicate lavender gradient that flows seamlessly into the new petal texture.
signature_feature: Back appendage: translucent petal layers with crystalline veins and soft starlight silver glow.
